blocks.heading: FAQ
bullets: Does DeltaCore replace PetroMan or AVA? — No. DeltaCore augments existing providers as an intelligence layer.
Is the product source code public? — No. DeltaCore source is private. This portal is a curated public documentation site.
What is built today? — AppGen-scaffolded API, MVC admin, PostgreSQL schema and core entity CRUD.
When will live PetroMan data be integrated? — Target M2–M7 pilot milestones after provider API access.
Why a separate portal repo? — To share vision and architecture without exposing proprietary source code.
How do I update portal content? — Edit portal/data/*.json in the private repo, run build-portal.ps1, push; CI deploys to public portal repo.

blocks.heading: Open questions (to resolve)
